name: Kid Activity Registration Command Center
description: Organizes child activity registrations with deadline tracking, document checklists, payments, gear, schedules, transportation, and follow-up reminders.
author: Bell (design)
target_user: Parents, caregivers, guardians, and family organizers managing multiple child activities or seasonal registration windows.
use_cases: Comparing activity options and family capacity
Tracking forms, waivers, payments, and receipts
Preparing calendar handoffs for pickups and drop-offs
